flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Coppin State University are 24% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($46.5k vs $61.4k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Coppin State University fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (14.1% → 10.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Coppin State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Coppin State University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (57.0% → 66.2%).
